description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized female figure standing upright on a round base, with one arm bent at the hip and the other raised high above her head. The raised hand supports a spherical object, likely representing a lamp or orb, held delicately by outstretched fingers. The figure is rendered in a smooth, metallic bronze finish, giving it an elegant and classical appearance. The sculpture's form is slender and elongated, with subtle detailing on the face and body, emphasizing an Art Deco or early 20th-century aesthetic. The base is broad and stable, supporting the vertical posture of the figure. The orb at the top is a contrasting white, suggesting it may be made of glass or a similar translucent material.
description: A bronze-colored sculpture of a stylized female figure holding a white orb aloft, standing on a round base with an elegant, classical design.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the figure's face, bent arm at the hip, and the raised arm holding the white orb above her head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the curvature of the body, and the orb held high.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure, the arm akimbo, and the orb held above, with the base fully visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the extended leg, and the orb held overhead.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized female figure holding an orb
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
